title: Migrate preview consumers to preview:frame bus (MPI-269 P4/P5)
description: Migrate the live-latent consumers off the legacy generation:preview path onto the MPI-269 preview:frame bus + activeGenerations.getLastPreview(genId): (1) MpiBaseApp app pane (js/components/Organisms/MpiBaseApp/MpiBaseApp.js:166), (2) gallery placeholder card. Seed from getLastPreview on mount/repaint so a pane shows the current latent through frame gaps. Then P5: retire the legacy generation:preview emit + exec.onPreview->setPreview path once both consumers are migrated. MUST verify a REMOTE-connected gen too (feedback_runpod_not_local_engine_proof). Contract: docs/preview-bus.md + tasks/MPI-269/handoffs/bus-contract.md.
